title: dortmanna aquatica
intro: Dortmanna aquatica, also known as water dock, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Salicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing swelling and pain, and it has been used to treat conditions such as arthritis and gout. The herbal preparations of Dortmanna aquatica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
